requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a minimal editorial studio runway. Use a poised adult fashion model as the only moving person. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single elegant shot in a minimal editorial studio runway. Begin with the same model and scene as the first frame: the poised adult model already wearing the real oatmeal beige long trench coat, fully belted, standing centered on a warm cream runway with a cream cyclorama behind. The lighting is soft and warm, with a subtle frontal key and a gentle rim that defines the coat’s edges. The scene is quiet and uncluttered, with no audience and no extra props. The camera slowly pushes in as the model performs a measured, graceful pivot from a three-quarter stance toward a front-facing position. Keep arms relaxed at the sides and avoid exaggerated gestures. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, stable body pose, and stable product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: A single elegant shot in a minimal editorial studio runway. Begin with the same model and scene as the first frame: the poised adult model already wearing the real oatmeal beige long trench coat, fully belted, standing centered on a warm cream runway with a cream cyclorama behind. The lighting is soft and warm, with a subtle frontal key and a gentle rim that defines the coat’s edges. The scene is quiet and uncluttered, with no audience and no extra props. The camera slowly pushes in as the model performs a measured, graceful pivot from a three-quarter stance toward a front-facing position. Keep arms relaxed at the sides and avoid exaggerated gestures. Let the silk-cotton faille surface catch the light softly, showing a refined drape without flutter or wind. As the camera nears a medium-full view, the model faces camera and holds a composed posture for a brief moment, emphasizing the belted waist, collar line, and long silhouette. Maintain stable lighting and minimal movement, ending on a still, premium portrait of the trench.
requests.overlay_text:
Burberry Foxfield Trench
Silk–cotton faille. Refined oatmeal beige.
requests.audio_direction: Subtle premium ambient score with soft piano tones; no voiceover; clean studio sound.
